---
title: "About this Site"
---

Hello! My name is Zach, you may know me as a teaching assistant in one of your courses.
I made this website to help answer common questions I and my fellow TAs get.

I hope you find this website helpful, if you would like to contact me try emailing me using my
university username or sending me a teams message. My network username is`TWZ6852`.

Please don't use my `zach.barrett@aut.ac.nz` address. I do not check it.


I made this website using [quarto](https://quarto.org/) and a custom theme based on stephango's excellent [flexoki](https://stephango.com/flexoki) colourscheme.
